title: Full Thrust Game Command
description: Definitions of possible commands that change game state

oneOf.description: Places a new, pristine ship on the board. If the scenario calls for a less-than-pristine state, then issue whatever commands are necessary to bring the ship to that state. Do not use this for uncloaking a ship! Just issue a `moveShip` order with visible `position` coordinates.

object.description: The content of the ship, as defined by the ftLibShip schema.

svg.description: The SVG code for this ship. It must be a <symbol> tag with a `viewBox` attribute. The image must be oriented such that the front of the ship is at the top of the image. Anything with a fill colour of '#030303' will be replaced by the assigned player's colour.

owner.description: The name of the owning player. The corresponding player object must already be defined.

position.description: Either valid x,y coordinates or `null` if the object is cloaked or otherwise invisible

course.description: Expressed as degrees (0 = starboard, CCW). Required when movementMode is vector.

movementMode.description: Movement system for this ship. Fixed at placement.

deployedSquadrons.description: FTL wings/gunboats placed on map with the ship (hyperspace entry).

oneOf.description: Movement command. Phase 1 orders store deltas only (cinematic allocation or vector maneuvers) and resolve in phase 5 from the ship's position at resolution. Ships without orders still drift at current speed.

course.description: Expressed as degrees (0 = starboard, CCW). Set for vector ships.

cinematicAllocation.description: Cinematic thrust/turn allocation (delta). Resolved from ship state in phase 5.

advancedDrives.description: Whether advanced drives apply to this cinematic allocation.

vectorManeuvers.description: Ordered vector maneuvers for this move (rotate, push, mainDrive).

vectors.description: A list of movement vectors involved in this command. This will be simply added to the existing array.

deployMineLayers.description: mineLayer system ids that will deploy a mine when movement resolves in phase 5.

launchFighters.description: Declare intent to launch fighters in phase 3. When set, movement may not use thrust.

oneOf.description: Lays a mine

ship.description: The uuid of the ship laying the mine.

systemId.description: The mineLayer system id deploying this mine.

position.description: Point on the ship's movement path where the mine is placed.

id.description: Stable uuid for the mine ordnance object when movement resolves.

oneOf.description: Launches ordnance

ship.description: The uuid of the launching ship.

id.description: The uuid of the new ordnance object on the board.

systemId.description: The uuid of the system being triggered. This is what determines the icon to display.

type.description: Ordnance type to place on the board.

range.description: Optional display range in MUs (homing/explosion hint).

detonateOpenSpace.description: AMT: explode in open space (skip phase 7 homing).

oneOf.description: Move ordnance; phase 3 (multistage) or phase 7
Records the use of a single 'charge' of ammunition. The `launchOrdnance` command does this automatically. You shouldn't need this most of the time.
Launches fighters

ship.description: The uuid of the launching ship.

id.description: The uuid of the fighter squadron being launched.

hangarId.description: Hangar system id the wing launches from.

callsign.description: Optional wing name; applied only if the group has no callsign yet.

oneOf.description: Moving fighters. Just enter the changed information. Vectors are additive.

position.description: Either a 'position' if launched, or a hangar id if docked.

vectors.description: A list of movement vectors. Added to the existing vector array.

distanceMu.description: Distance moved in MU (recorded on issue).

oneOf.description: Declare a fighter group is screening a friendly ship or fighter group (phase 4/6).

facing.description: Clock facing while screening (default: current group facing).

ship.description: Legacy: friendly ship id (use targetType/targetId for fighter groups)

oneOf.description: Declare a fighter group is pursuing an enemy target (phase 4).
Adjust non-positional fighter stats. Provide the changed values.

number.description: The number of surviving fighters in the squadron

endurance.description: The squad's endurance, which is reset when recovered.

skill.description: Only needed if you are playing with ace/turkey rules

oneOf.description: Launches a gunboat squadron from a rack or boat bay.
Moving gunboat squadrons.

recoverEndurance.description: When docking in boat bay, set squad endurance after recover (typically 6).

oneOf.description: Gunboat screening (phase 4/6).
Gunboat pursuit (phase 4).
Adjust gunboat squadron stats.
Phase 7 gunboat attack allocation.
Set gunboat squadron callsign.
Launch ordnance from gunboats (phase 3).
Fire a weapon at a target. Optional rolls make replay deterministic without re-rolling.

ship.description: The uuid of the firing ship

weapon.description: The uid of the firing weapon system

target.description: The uuid of target being fired at, whether ship, ordnance, or other

rolls.description: Optional d6 results used for this attack (including penetrating rerolls in order).

damage.description: Optional precomputed hull damage from this shot (before armour allocation helpers).

oneOf.description: Apply damage to a ship object

ship.description: The uuid of the ship object

hull.description: Number of hull points lost. Numbers are additive to existing damage.

armour.description: Number of boxes of armour lost. First element is the innermost shell. Numbers are additive to existing damage.

oneOf.description: Regenerate boxes of armour

ship.description: The uuid of the ship in question

armour.description: Number of boxes of armour to repair. First element is the innermost shell.

oneOf.description: Disable a system

state.description: Helps keep track of whether a system has been repaired before or not.

oneOf.description: Enable a system

state.description: Helps to keep track of whether a system has been repaired before or not.

oneOf.description: Destroy an object (remove it completely from the game)

uuid.description: Uuid of the object in question

oneOf.description: Hide an object temporarily (e.g., cloaking a ship). To show a ship again, issue a `moveShip` command with valid coordinates.

uuid.description: Uuid of the object in question

oneOf.description: Awards victory points to a player

vp.description: The amount of VP to award the player. Can be negative. Is simply added to existing total.

oneOf.description: A generic command used just to insert things into the combat log. These commands have no effect on the actual game visuals.
Advance the turn sequence to a specific phase (1-15).

phase.description: Target phase index matching the Continuum turn sequence.

turn.description: Optional turn number. If omitted, turn is unchanged unless phase wraps from 15 to 1.

oneOf.description: Record initiative rolls for the current turn.

winner.description: Player id that won initiative. Required so ties can be resolved by the moderator.

oneOf.description: Record a dice roll sequence in the combat log for audit/replay. Does not mutate board objects.

purpose.description: Why these dice were rolled (e.g. beam fire, PDS, threshold).

context.description: Optional freeform context (ship id, weapon id, etc.).

result.description: Human-readable outcome of the roll (hit/miss, damage, etc.).

oneOf.description: Update game package metadata that is not turn/phase/initiative.

diceSeed.description: Optional seed for reproducible client PRNG.

allowVectorMovement.description: If true, players may choose vector movement when placing ships.

includeCoreSystemsInThreshold.description: If true, threshold checks include bridge, life support, and reactor cores.

oneOf.description: Update optional Core Systems state on a ship (bridge/life support/reactor).

lifeless.description: Turns until life support fails. Negative clears the field.

uncontrolled.description: Turns remaining out of control. Negative clears the field.

dumped.description: Reactor dumped — powerless but no explosion rolls.

abandonedSinceTurn.description: Turn crew abandoned ship; lowers explosion threshold. Negative clears.

oneOf.description: Advance within-phase segment (orders to resolve, or resolve to next activation).
Declare ordnance launch for current ship activation (phase 3 orders segment). Rockets use targetShip without position.

rocketIds.description: Pre-generated ids for up to 2 rocket markers.

oneOf.description: Resolve declared ordnance launches for the current ship activation.

rolls.description: Optional 2d6 for rocket pod to-hit (override dice policy).

oneOf.description: Declare weapon fire (phase 9 PDS or phase 11 ship fire). notes JSON may include mode, fireControlId, needleSystemId, beamClass, screens, range, arc, pdsDice, weaponName, alteredFromDefaults.
Resolve declared fire for current ship; companion dmgShip commands apply damage.
Queue transporter beam hits for post-resolve delivery (phase 11).
Declare transporter delivery for one banked hit (phase 11).
Set enemy boarder unit counts for one attacker on a defender ship (replaces that owner's units).
Adjust enemy boarder units (+/−) for one attacker on a defender ship.
Remove specific boarder units by id (e.g. after combat).
Step 1a: Attacker Allocation — declare kill/raze per boarder unit.
Step 1b: Defender Allocation — assign DCP repel and marines per boarder.
Resolve boarding combat (Step 1c: DCP Repel, Step 2: Resolve Combat, Step 3: Raze).
Mark a ship's pending hull threshold check as resolved (phase 13).
Mark reactor breach resolution complete for phase 15 (effects applied by preceding commands).
Declare damage-control repair allocations for phase 14 (JSON notes).
Resolve declared repair orders for a ship (phase 14).
Resolve deferred movement and mine placements in phase 5 (moderator).
Resolve mine sweep and detonation dice after phase 5 movement.

preExpanded.description: When true, mine effects were already logged as separate commands.

oneOf.description: Adjust regenerative armour damage on one row (phase 14 resolve).
Recompute phase 7 homing ordnance allocation proposals (moderator).
Manual override for phase 7 ordnance target allocation.
Clear a phase 7 ordnance allocation proposal or applied target.
Apply pending phase 7 ordnance allocations to the board.
Declare phase 7 fighter group attack allocation.
Set or clear a fighter group's display callsign (moderator).

callsign.description: New callsign; omit or empty string to clear.

oneOf.description: Set operational fighter type (moderator). Used after multiRole placement.
Launch fighter wing ordnance (phase 3).
Resolve a multi-group furball dogfight (phase 8).
Fighter group intercepts ordnance (phase 8).
Declare a furball engagement for phase 8 (orders segment; no dice).
Moderator batch-resolve all declareFurball engagements in phase 8.

rolls.description: Dice sequence for deterministic replay (all engagements).

notes.description: Human-readable summary of all engagements (for log display and replay).

oneOf.description: Declare point defense allocation for phase 9.
Moderator batch-resolve all point defense declarations in phase 9.
Resolve one point defense mount in phase 9 (scrub-back step).
Phase 9 point defense resolve complete (rollup metadata only).
Detonate AMT open-space or PBL in phase 10.
Homing ordnance strike vs ship in phase 10.
Phase 10 section 8.9 attack-run intercept.
Fighter ship attack run in phase 10.
Gunboat squadron ship attack in phase 10.
Phase 10 strike resolution complete (rollup metadata).
Phase 11 hull-destruction cleanup rollup (ships removed at transition to phase 12).
Bank EMP beam hits on a target ship for phase 13 resolution.
Attacker allocates banked EMP hits to target systems (phase 13).
Resolve banked EMP hits on a target after allocations (phase 13).
Mark a ship as captured by boarding (exempt from hull-destruction sweep).
Transfer ship ownership (e.g. after boarding capture).
